<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check state after clicking on blue shape
after = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== M squares ===")
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] <= 10:
        print(f"  M {n['pixels']}px boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== Blue shape ===")
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"  b {n['pixels']}px")

ascii_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nBottom bar white count: {ascii_after[63].count('W')}")

print(f"\nLast action result: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
</parameter>

Currently, the white bar is at 4. I need 2 more actions that move M squares to reduce it to 0.
Let me try moving another M square to the blue shape.
